instructions:
You are working on AutoMedia — an automated media production pipeline in Python.

Key constraints:
- For archiving, always use the `automedia archive` command
- Do NOT use --force to archive (Red Line 8 — only the user may force-archive)
- Tests use synthetic data in tests/fixtures/synth/ — do not commit real project data
- Follow architecture patterns documented in AGENTS.md and docs/developer-guide.md
- Gate naming convention: G0-G5 (copy), V0-V7 (video), L1-L3 (lifecycle)

Available scripts:
- `make install` — development installation
- `make test` — run test suite
- `make lint` — code linting
- `make mcp` — start MCP server
